com.mentor.chs.plugin.query

Interface IXSBOMContextFilterExpression

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXCustomExpression, IXCustomFilterExpression, IXFilterExpression, IXPlugin

    public interface IXSBOMContextFilterExpression
extends IXCustomFilterExpression
    Interface for implementing SBOM Context Filter Expressions. An SBOM Filter Expression returns a boolean for a given IXObject. These classes allow the query engine to filter objects based on analyzing an SBOM container.

    isSatisfiedBy(IXObject object, IXSBOMEvaluationContext) returns a boolean to determine if the given XObject satisfies a certain condition.

    Example : 

            boolean isSatifiedBy(IXObject entity, IXSBOMEvaluationContext context) {
                if (entity instanceof IXConnector && context.getCurrentSubAssembly().getChildren().isEmpty()) {
                        return true;
         }
                return false;
     }

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.query.IXCustomExpression

      boolean isSatisfiedBy(IXObject entity, IXSBOMEvaluationContext context)

    • Method Detail

      • isSatisfiedBy

        boolean isSatisfiedBy(IXObject entity,
                      IXSBOMEvaluationContext context)
        Evaluate a filter expression for a given object and SBOM container. If it satisfies the filter condition then return true, otherwise false

        Example:

        The following example returns true if a wire is part of a particular sub-assembly. 

         boolean isSatisfiedBy(IXObject entity, IXSBOMEvaluationContext context) {
     if (entity instanceof IXWire) {
                         IXSubAssembly wireSub =
                           context.getSignificantParent(context.getSBOMContext().getOwnerRootSubAssembly((IXWire)entity));
           return context.getCurrentSubAssembly().getChildren().contains(object);
     }
     return false;
 }
        Parameters:
        entity - -- the extensibility object being tested.
        context - -- an "SBOM" context - allows custom filters to interact with an SBOM container
        Returns:
        true if satisfied by the filter expression, false otherwise
